title: Founder OS HQ - Tasks
description: Consolidated task database merging P01 Inbox Zero action items, P04 Action Item Extractor tasks, and P06 Follow-Up Tracker follow-ups. Each record has a Type column indicating its source.

Source Type.description: Where the task was extracted from

Days Waiting.description: P06: Days since follow-up was created

Thread ID.description: Gmail Thread ID for deduplication of email-sourced tasks

notes: Merged database for all task-like records. Plugins filter by Type when reading (e.g., P06 queries Type='Follow-Up'). Deduplication: P01 and P04 use Title + Source Title within their Type; P06 uses Thread ID. Company/Contact relations are populated when email domain or attendee info maps to a CRM record. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Tasks' first, then fall back to plugin-specific DB names ('Inbox Zero - Action Items', 'Action Item Extractor - Tasks', 'Follow-Up Tracker - Follow-Ups').
